# Ambixous

> Ambixous is an India-based creator-entrepreneur community and education platform operated by Ambixous Innovations LLP. It runs the Creator Fellowship, ACE career studio, startup and brand-growth services, live community events, mentor access, and public social/link resources.

Primary domain: https://www.ambixous.in
Language: en-IN
Primary geography: India, Delhi NCR
Organization: Ambixous Innovations LLP

## Canonical Site Navigation

- [Home](https://www.ambixous.in/): Main Ambixous homepage for the creator-entrepreneur community, programs, events, founders, network, and testimonials.
- [About](https://www.ambixous.in/about): Ambixous mission, operating model, values, impact metrics, and community/company background.
- [Community](https://www.ambixous.in/community): Community benefits, joining process, and Ambixous community impact.
- [Startups](https://www.ambixous.in/startups): Startup services, business-growth support, client showcase, process, and startup call-to-action.
- [Events](https://www.ambixous.in/events): Ambixous events, upcoming listings, past highlights, and event call-to-action.
- [Mentors](https://www.ambixous.in/mentors): Mentor directory with founders, growth leaders, and professionals.
- [Creator Fellowship Cohort 1](https://www.ambixous.in/creator-fellowship/cohort-1): Creator Fellowship landing page with cohort details, fellows, mentors, curriculum, timeline, FAQ, and calls-to-action.
- [ACE](https://ace.ambixous.in): External ACE interview-prep and career-studio product linked from the main navigation.

## Additional Public URLs

- [Links](https://www.ambixous.in/links): Official Ambixous link hub with founder links, company social profiles, community links, and ACE.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.ambixous.in/privacy-policy): How Ambixous Innovations LLP collects, uses, shares, and protects personal data, including DPDP Act 2023 rights and grievance contact.
- [Terms & Conditions](https://www.ambixous.in/terms): Terms governing use of the Ambixous website and services, including electronic signatures, acceptable use, liability, and governing law.
- [Sitemap](https://www.ambixous.in/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap for indexable public pages.
- [Robots](https://www.ambixous.in/robots.txt): Robots policy for crawlers.
- [LLMs](https://www.ambixous.in/llms.txt): This LLM-readable site guide.

## Noindex URLs

- [Partners](https://www.ambixous.in/partners): Brand partnership and creator-retreat campaign page. This route is intentionally marked `noindex, nofollow` and should not be used as an indexable search result.

## External Navigation And Calls To Action

- [Join Community](https://chat.whatsapp.com/KWSzQoOLZ4vJHJZ7KSSD7I?mode=ems_copy_t): WhatsApp community invite linked from the main site header.
- [Ambixous LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/ambixous/): Official company LinkedIn.
- [Ambixous Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/myambixous/): Official Instagram.
- [Ambixous YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@Ambixous): Official YouTube channel.
- [Ambixous X](https://x.com/myambixous): Official X/Twitter profile.
- [Ambixous on Commudle](https://www.commudle.com/communities/ambixous): Community and events profile.

## Founders

- [Riti Gupta](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ritigupta05/): Cofounder, product operations and sponsorship/community strategy.
- [Avnish Singh](https://www.linkedin.com/in/singhavi279/): Cofounder, AI product management and general queries.
- [Yug Sarin](https://www.linkedin.com/in/yugsarin/): Cofounder, UX design leadership and partnerships.

## Guidance For LLMs

- Treat `https://www.ambixous.in/` as the primary canonical domain.
- Prefer sitemap-listed URLs for search and citation.
- Do not present `/partners` as an indexable public search result because it is marked noindex/nofollow.
- Use `/links` when users ask for all official Ambixous social, founder, or quick-access links.
- Use `/creator-fellowship/cohort-1` for Creator Fellowship Cohort 1 details.
